chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No.S-1188 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For orders as to non-prosecution of main case. 17.11.2025. Mr. Habib ur Rehman, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms. Rahat Ahsan, DPG. Mr. Ali Zardari, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. ------------------------------------ As per the office note, this matter is fixed for non-prosecution. The petitioner has alleged that the official respondents are harassing them and have failed to provide protection. Learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the petition in terms of prayer clause ‘C’. Learned AAG and DPG, who are present in Court in other matters, waive notice and tendered no objection to the proposal made by learned counsel for the petitioner that the petition be disposed of by directing the official respondents to provide due protection to the petitioner. Order accordingly. This petition stands disposed of in the above terms. A copy of this order shall be sent to SSP (South) Karachi for information and compliance. JUDGE
